dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4533 IS: Coast Guard Personnel Equipment Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Graham introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To amend title 10, United States Code, to include the Coast Guard in the requirement to buy certain articles from American sources.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Coast Guard Personnel Equipment Act.

section.header: Requirement for Coast Guard to buy certain articles from American sources
section.text: Section 4862 of title 10, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking Department of Defense and inserting Department of Defense or any branch of the Armed Forces;
in subsection (c), by striking the Secretary of the military department concerned and inserting the Secretary concerned;

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1), by striking Department of Defense and inserting Department of Defense or any branch of the Armed Forces; and

in paragraph (2)(B), by striking The Secretary of Defense and inserting The Secretary of Defense or, with respect to the Coast Guard when it is not operating as a service in the Navy, the Secretary of Homeland Security;

in paragraph (2)(B), by striking Secretary of Defense and inserting Secretary of Defense or, with respect to the Coast Guard when it is not operating as a service in the Navy, the Secretary of Homeland Security; and
in paragraph (3), by striking Secretary of Defense and inserting Secretary of Defense, in consultation with the Secretary of Homeland Security,; and

paragraph.text: in subsection (k), by striking or of the military department concerned and inserting or the Secretary concerned.
